ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* The part number as assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "thickness" TEXT /* The thickness of the part */,
  "identifying_mark" INTEGER /* A unique identifying mark for the part */,
  "version" INTEGER /* The version of the part */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* The name of the part */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the part */,
  "material" TEXT /* The material the part is made of */,
  "weight" TEXT /* The weight of the part */,
  "length" TEXT /* The length of the part */,
  "width" TEXT /* The width of the part */,
  "color" TEXT /* The color of the part */,
  "part_type" TEXT /* The type of part (e.g., engine, chassis, interior) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a part */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part */,
  "thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the part for this version */,
  "identifying_mark" INTEGER /* Identifying mark for the part for this version */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when this version became effective */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the version change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The user who approved the version change */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* The date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_versions_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the part is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the inventory record */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The minimum quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to reorder when the reorder level is reached */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* The critical stock level that requires immediate action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part used in assembly */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was used in assembly */,
  "assembly_line" TEXT /* Assembly line where the part was used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the operator who used the part in assembly */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* The serial number of the part used in assembly */,
  "assembly_location" TEXT /* The specific location within the assembly line where the part was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was inspected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the inspector who conducted the quality control */,
  "inspection_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the inspection */,
  "retest_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a retest is required */,
  "retest_date" TEXT /* The date when the retest is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, supervisor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the part record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the part record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device used to access the system */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* The specific action taken during the access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
